logline: Sean draws; the mascot notices and delights; everything settles back to the start.

beats.title: Establishing two-shot
beats.intent: Set the look, framing, and scale — the compositional anchor the loop returns to.

beats.title: The draw
beats.intent: Sean's hand moves on the page; the mascot turns to look at what he's making.

beats.title: The notice
beats.intent: The mascot perks up (alert-perk) — the spark of catching the idea.

beats.title: The delight
beats.intent: The mascot reacts with small, real delight; Sean stays absorbed in the work.

beats.title: The settle
beats.intent: The mascot eases back toward idle; Sean's hand returns to start — the loop closes.
